lsp session.jsonl
stdout '"name":"Login opportunity tree"'
stdout '"name":"Outcome"'
stdout '"name":"Requirement: Login"'
stdout '"label":"## Experiments"'
stdout 'Opportunity Solution Tree extension'

-- session.jsonl --
